reviews.review_title: Good game, just stopped making updates.
reviews.review_description: When I use to play back in 2021-2022 with my friends, it was a lot of fun! But they stopped releasing updates and started paying attention to stride fates, Their newer stride game. I still play this game on the solo modes because there isn't anymore players. Only 1 time a week I'm actually able to find a match. I would recommend buying the newer one if you are thinking about buying

Im only giving it a 5 star bc 6 months ago to a year ago it used to be one of my favourite games of all time but now it's a broken mess I can't pull out my gun anymore no one are in My games anymore and when I spam buttons it pulls out my pistol then I can't shoot or put it away it's just straight up a broken mess right now please fix ur game

reviews.review_title: If only the game was accessable offline
reviews.review_description:
I really enjoyed this game, I enjoyed how simple the game is and I liked how fast paced everything is, I like how the guns and the running is handled, and I understand in the description the game could be played offline but it still says that you need to be connected online to access it. Other than that, 4 stars, one more star would be added if the internet wasn't required to be able to play the game.

Update, the multiplayer no longer works. So I don’t understand why I need an internet connection to even play the single player stuff to begin with anymore. It’s 2026 now.
It is ok but the moment is a little slow so i say get stabby VR for 9.99 insted but again it is ok
Awsome game adding the headshot blood

What happened? This was my favourite game, 
and now no one plays it anymore.

reviews.review_title: its a good game, but no updates anymore?
reviews.review_description: multiplayer is fun, parkour is fun, shooting is fun, but this game has gotten SO STALE from no updates. ive been playing since ~2021 and i stopped in 2022 because it just got boring, and i dont think thats changing.
Too boring now no updates anymore
Best game I’ve ever had. I’m obsessed with shooter games and I’m obsessed with parkour games. Just like gorilla tag the best game ever.
This is probably my favourite game on my vr but it is really hard to reload the pistol but it might be because im not very strong💪

So basically I was playing tag champions with a
 friend and I tag him multiple times but it says I didn't tag him mind you this game hasn't been updated in years and people only play this game if they're bored I promise you no one would buy this game anymore

This game seems like it could be great but is missing any sort of control options. At the very least I want to be able to switch my primary hand and those jumping and running motions they force you to do would be great to turn off. Having an always run option and jump button would be great. I don't know about everyone else but throwing my arms in the air to jump just seems weird.

I thought this was a dynamic shooter with more or less classic controls, but it turned out to be a game in which control is a pain, there are games in which there are intuitive controls, but here there is no rhythm or logic
I was always getting cucked by my wife but when i installed it my sigma male friend accepted me into their sigma group and now i have unlimited skibidi sigma rizz, level 10 gyatt

The devs haven’t and will probably never add anything new to this game, for years there has been no more content update other than improvements / fixes to the STILL BROKEN Multiplayer and despite the absolutely boring Singleplayer (you can either do the endless run which is a bit fun because of random generation but the Arena is just and has always been the same). Now if you were to jump into Multiplayer be aware of waiting about 15 minutes in an empty lobby just to also end up in an empty game (if you’re lucky you might eventually find a game with maybe 3 people but it’s just super broken and annoying to find a match with actual people in it) Since the last “multiplayer fix” - update and seeing it’s still not working will probably never get me back on this game if the devs don’t come back instead of abandoning this game which used to be my favorite VR game and also one reason why I wanted a VR headset because the game has been so fun in the first months playing it. Now after so much time it’s just bad and if it stays like this you’ll only have fun as a new player or maybe returning every few months for a round of endless mode :]

And regarding the fact they only focus on Stride Fates… well they don’t even do that too much because Stride Fates isn’t really much better than Stride regarding its technology / new mechanics (graphics are also not nearly better)
Despite all that it’s just sad how few effort they put into the Stride Series 😔

No campaign no two handed weapons the loading took a hour and the game is not fun



Horrible
Poor , veey poor, wheres the refund button ?
Am i blind, or is there any MR mode?
Lied about single player story mode which is why anyone purchased this in the first place. Horrible way to treat buyers of this game. Dont buy games from these devs anymore. They are full of LIES

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your opinion.

We originally announced a free update that was set to include a one-hour story episode. 
However, a week later, based on community feedback, we officially announced the cancellation of these plans and embarked on the development of a comprehensive world-class story game with 5+ gameplay hours, technical and graphical improvements and new content. Fates is a separate full-fledged game, which we were happy to announce when announcing the trailer. 

We hope you will enjoy Fates no matter what!
Joy Way

reviews.review_title: Could not jump in the tutorial
reviews.review_description: No matter how many times I would try to jump, I couldn’t do it. I would do exactly as  it was showed in the tutorial and I would get right to the edge and I still couldn’t jump to the target.

developer_response.body: Hello! Thanks for sharing your feedback with us. At the moment there are no technical problems with jumping in the game. Please try again to replay the tutorial and learn this Freature.

reviews.review_title: Fun destroyed in the latest update
reviews.review_description:
This used to be one of my favorite VR games because it had fun stylish enemies that were fun to shoot.
In the latest update they completely removed those enemies and replaced them with generic white dudes in hoodies that feel awful to point a gun at and fire, they have also added huge yellow drones to the map which serve no purpose other than to have an annoying drone buzzing sound effect in your ear almost at all times. I have no idea why you guys would drop such an iconic part of your game in favor of what looks like store bought assets for the enemies but maybe you'll come around on your bad decision someday.

5 Stars to 1 Star
Make it free for a week
Clunky and impossible to play
Don’t play it
Game will pause and whenever I try to resume, it will automatically pause again. Over and over.

developer_response.body:
Hey! Thanks for the information. We have not yet encountered such a problem and we will definitely check and try to fix it as soon as possible. It will be very cool if you send a video with the problem to iDk#8130 on our discord server. 

Here is the link - https://discord.com/invite/SekGnWd

reviews.review_description: The trials are fun but arena mode is where its at. Dont get me wrong, you'll find yourself sweating playing for hours, but it gets boring. Same 3 missions to do over and over, one gun with sub-par gun action (too simple reload, no weapon shot animations, one plain pistol with no other weapon) you can't interact with enemies, they simply fall over with no physics. You can't push them over, pick them up, throw the bodies over the edge etc. The arena map gets very boring quickly with only 2 grappling hook things to use in the worst spots which is a cool mechanic barely used. Overall would love to see more polish and more content but I doubt seeing any added within 2 months or more

developer_response.body: Hey! Thank you for your feedback. You can try alternating game modes and devote more time to Endless or Timerun mode. However, of course, new content will be added with each new update to all game modes, including Arena mode.

developer_response.body: Hey! Thanks for the feedback. This issue is, unfortunately, beyond our influence. The best solution at the moment would be to write to Oculus support. We hope they will help you solve this problem as soon as possible.

reviews.review_description: The game is really fun definitely recommend but don’t recommend for a first vr game as it does cause me motion sickness but if you are already used to vr or don’t get motion sick easy you definitely need to at to your library it is a lot of fun

Graphics:good      Loading time:I may As well play a different game while I wait          Time to finish:￼♾         Enjoyment:gets boring quickly      Loading time to get into a match that is multiplayer like (combat,horde,capture the flag,quick match):I waited 47 minutes just to get into a match of horde. developer_response.body: Thank you for your review. We apologize for the slow loading times and the long wait to join a match. We are actively working to improve the loading times and the matchmaking experience.

reviews.review_description: I've loved parkour ever since the release of of the first mirror's edge. SO when I found out about this game, I watched some videos, fell in love and knew I had to get it. This is by FAR my favorite VR game I have. Thank you guys for making such a great game!

This game sucks from the enemys being super challenging and the parkour having so many jumps the wall running is hard the time slow is slowww and the gun is hard to aim also there isnt many multiplayer people online 😤
This GAME  is so fun . My favorite thing to do is endless . And it's definitely a workout . It's literally mirrors edge but in VR

mirrors edge in vr, very immersive for me(I hope I won't smash tv or something, it's this level immersive), controls are good, I think multiplayer would be awesome, game of tag, capture the flag, these two gamemodes without guns, just running away would we something else
